visual_description:
The audio is filled with a somber and atmospheric musical score. A slow, melancholic melody, carried by what sounds like a string orchestra, creates a serious and contemplative mood. The music is low and resonant, evoking a sense of gravity and anticipation, as if building up to a significant or somber moment. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the dramatic and pensive music to dominate the soundscape.

The scene opens on a tight, profile shot of a man's face in near darkness. He has dark hair and a serious, contemplative expression. The lighting is dim and moody, highlighting the contours of his face. The background is almost entirely black, with a few out-of-focus, horizontal light streaks suggesting a window or a moving vehicle at night. To the right, the out-of-focus silhouette of another person's shoulder is visible. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is present. The camera is static, holding a close-up on the man's face.

The camera cuts to a wide shot of two men in dark suits walking down a set of outdoor stairs at night. The man in the foreground has dark hair, while the man slightly behind him has short, white hair
